title: 8th central pay commission: Hike in minimum pay, increment and DA — Here's how employee groups want salaries to change
summary: The 8th central pay commission is consulting with stakeholders to gather input for its recommendations. Meetings are scheduled across various states and territories to collect feedback. Here's what some of the biggest employee groups are demanding…

title: How the deemed residency rule can hurt NRIs in some West Asian countries
summary: If Indian-source taxable income from property sales, equity gains, dividend or interest crosses ₹15 lakh in any financial year, deemed residency kicks in and every treaty benefit disappears.

title: 50-30-20 vs envelope vs zero-based budgeting: Which method suits you best?
summary: 50-30-20, envelope, and zero-based budgeting: three personal finance systems that help manage income, control spending, and improve savings discipline through structured planning, flexible methods, and financial clarity.&nbsp;

title: Can Indians earn from idle gold through stablecoins? Why CoinSwitch co-founder sees challenges in Nikhil Kamath’s idea
summary: Nikhil Kamath proposed a gold-backed stablecoin to monetize idle gold in Indian households. CoinSwitch's Ashish Singhal noted existing global products but highlighted challenges with India's gold, including regulation, trust, and storage of non-standardized gold assets.

title: EPFO deadline alert: File April 2026 ECR, deposit PF dues by 15 May to avoid penalties
summary: The EPFO ECR filing deadline reminder urges employers to submit the April 2026 returns and deposit provident fund contributions by 15 May to avoid penalties, interest charges and compliance issues.&nbsp;

title: Should you add silver instead of gold after the duty hike-triggered price rally? Experts say, ‘a tactical addition…’
summary: India has increased import tariffs on gold and silver to 15%, up from 6%, to reduce imports and protect foreign exchange reserves. This tariff increase led to a nearly 6% price surge in both metals, impacting demand for gold jewellery and prompting investors to consider silver as an alternative.

title: Income isn’t wealth: The silent trap of high-flying executives
summary: High income, high lifestyle, zero strategy. Why even top executives with stellar careers often fail at wealth creation — and how misplaced confidence and poor execution derail financial futures.

title: Mirae Asset launches SIF-based Platinum Hybrid Long-Short Fund – key details explained
summary: Mirae Asset Mutual Fund has launched the Platinum Hybrid Long-Short Fund under the SIF category, offering conservative investors risk-adjusted returns through hedged equity, arbitrage and debt exposure in the country.

title: Gold and silver price today, May 14: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold and 999 silver in Delhi, Mumbai, other cities
summary: Gold and silver prices fell in India on 14 May amid key global developments. MCX gold futures slipped 0.37% to ₹1,62,270 per 10 gm, while silver futures dropped 1.61% to ₹2,96,160 per kg. Markets remained focused on the Trump-Xi summit, the new US Fed chair, and oil market volatility.

title: Bengal DA hike soon: Can Suvendu Adhikari's cabinet bridge the Centre-state gap? – Here's what to expect
summary: Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari announced that the cabinet will discuss Dearness Allowance and the Seventh Pay Commission on May 18. A recent 4% DA increase brings it to 22%, but state employees still lag behind central staff due to differing pay commissions.

title: Air India posts annual loss of $2.8 billion, Singapore Air results show
summary: Air India's losses amounted to 3.56 ‌billion Singapore dollars, the ​annual ​report ⁠showed, which at current exchange rates ​was $2.8 billion.

title: Hudco Q4 Results: Profit shoots up 172% to Rs 1,981 crore; co declares Rs 1.5 dividend
summary: Hudco posted a 172% rise in Q4 consolidated net profit to Rs 1,981 crore, driven by higher interest income and a substantial deferred tax gain. Revenue from operations climbed 25%, while annual profit rose 49%. The board also recommended a final dividend of Rs 1.5 per share for FY26.

title: Tata Motors PV Q4 Results: Profit falls 32% YoY to Rs 5,783 cr; co declares Rs 3/share dividend
summary: Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles saw its net profit drop 32% year-on-year to Rs 5,783 crore. Revenue from operations grew 7% to Rs 1.05 lakh crore. The company recommended a final dividend of Rs 3 per share. JLR faced a challenging year with revenue and profit impacted by several factors.

title: Block deal rush sparks revival hopes in Indian stock market
summary: A surge in block trades is signaling a potential revival in India’s equity capital markets after a sluggish start to 2026. Large deals, including stake sales in Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone and investment platform Groww, have pushed May block trade proceeds to Rs 200 billion, the highest th

title: India rupee slips to record low near 96 per USD as energy risks deepen
summary: The Indian rupee hit an all-time low, driven by high oil prices and portfolio outflows straining the economy. Policymakers are considering tax reductions for foreign investors on bonds to attract dollar inflows. Persistent balance of payments deficits and rising wholesale inflation signal ongoing ru

title: JSW Steel Q4 Results: Cons profit surges 131% YoY to Rs 3,475 crore, revenue rises 14%
summary: JSW Steel reported a significant 11-fold surge in consolidated net profit for the March quarter, reaching Rs 16,370 crore. This impressive growth was accompanied by a 14% year-on-year increase in revenue from operations, which stood at Rs 51,180 crore for Q4FY26.

title: S&P 500, Nasdaq futures rise to new highs as Nvidia jumps
summary: Nvidia rose 1.9% in premarket trading, giving the chipmaker a market ‌valuation of $5.9 trillion, ⁠after ⁠Reuters reported citing sources that the U.S. has cleared about 10 Chinese firms to buy its second-most powerful AI chip, ​the H200

title: IRFC Q4 Results: Co posts muted profit growth at Rs 1,684 crore, revenue rises 9% YoY
summary: Indian Railway Finance Corporation reported a largely flat Q4FY26 performance, with net profit inching up to Rs 1,684 crore from Rs 1,682 crore a year earlier. Revenue, however, rose 9% year-on-year to Rs 7,336 crore, reflecting steady growth in business operations.

title: Global Markets | Australian shares flat as bank rebound offsets broader losses; US-China talks in focus
summary: The meeting between the leaders of Australia's key ​trading partners is seen as a test for risk appetite in the resource-heavy bourse, with any thaw in relations likely to buoy miners, while ​renewed friction could deepen concerns over tariffs, inflation ⁠and global ‌growth.

title: Infosys, TCS and other IT stocks slide for third straight session as AI worries mount
summary: Indian IT stocks extended their decline for a fourth straight session as investors trimmed exposure amid weak growth visibility, muted client spending and rising concerns over AI-driven disruption. The Nifty IT index fell sharply, with major names including Infosys and Tata Consultancy Services slid
